common.error_generic: Could not send. Please try again.

app.disclaimer_built: Platform built by Venezuelans to help organize and centralize information and resources.
app.no_money: We do not ask for money.
app.no_liability: We are not responsible for services posted by third parties — we are a meeting point for those who need and offer help.
app.no_liability_short: We are not responsible for third-party services.

acopio.label: Collection centers
acopio.desc: Places that receive and distribute donations

necesidades.label: Needs by area
necesidades.desc: Areas with the greatest need for help

servicio.label: Offered services
servicio.desc: Individuals and groups offering their services

report_form.anonymous_notice: 100% anonymous. We don't ask for name, phone or account.
report_form.field_patients_note: Only what's necessary. Do not include sensitive data.
report_form.field_lists_note: Upload photos of physical lists or add links (Google Docs, Drive, etc.).
report_form.need_presets_label: Select the most common or add others below.
report_form.error_no_name: Please enter a name or title.
report_form.error_no_location: Mark the location on the map.
report_form.ph_emergency_name: E.g.: Fire in Los Palos Grandes building
report_form.ph_desc_emergency: Describe the situation: address, severity, people affected…
report_form.ph_desc_default: Describe the situation in as much detail as possible.
report_form.ph_zone_shelter: E.g.: El Valle, across from the market
report_form.ph_zone_emergency: E.g.: Petare, street 4 at main avenue

servicio_form.title: Offer a service
servicio_form.subtitle: Share what you can do for your community
servicio_form.anonymous_notice: Anonymous post. We don't ask for name or account. Contact is optional.
servicio_form.what_ph: E.g.: Plumbing, Civil engineer, English classes, Health volunteer
servicio_form.desc_ph: Describe in more detail what you can do, your experience, conditions, etc.
servicio_form.contact_note: Don't share data you don't want to make public.
servicio_form.error_no_name: Please enter the service name or title.
servicio_form.error_no_zone: Please enter the area or city where you offer the service.

detail_panel.news_note: Anyone can update the status. No personal data required.

location_picker.place_pin_label: Place the pin on the map
location_picker.or_tap_map: or tap directly on the map
location_picker.error_no_geo: Your device does not support geolocation.
location_picker.error_geo_fail: Could not get your location. Tap the map to mark it.
location_picker.error_not_found: Address not found. Try with more detail or tap the map.
location_picker.error_search_fail: Error searching address. Tap the map to mark it.

share_bar.copied: Link copied. Paste it in your Instagram story or post.

list_view.empty: No reports in the selected layers.

servicios_view.heading: Offered services
servicios_view.be_first: Be the first to offer a service
servicios_view.offer_cta: Do you have something to offer? Post it and help your community.
servicios_view.security_title: Security notice — protect yourself from scams
servicios_view.security_1: Never send money in advance in exchange for a service or help.
servicios_view.security_2: Be wary of those who request payment by transfer, top-up or cryptocurrency without having met you first.
servicios_view.security_3: Verify the person's identity before sharing personal data or your exact location.
servicios_view.security_4: Arrange the first meeting in a public place with a trusted person present.
servicios_view.security_5: If something seems too good to be true, it probably is.
servicios_view.security_6: This platform does not charge or endorse any service. Report suspicious activity to the contact email.

localizar_modal.title: Who found them?
localizar_modal.description: You are about to mark {{nombre}} as found. Leave the contact details of who found them for confirmation and follow-up.
localizar_modal.ph_name: Name of the person who found them
localizar_modal.ph_note: Optional: where they were seen, in what condition…

reportar_modal.title: Report content
reportar_modal.description: Why do you want to report this content? It is anonymous.
reportar_modal.done_message: We will review this content as soon as possible.
reportar_modal.detail_ph: Briefly tell us what is happening.

eliminar_modal.title: Request removal
eliminar_modal.done_message: We will review your request and remove the record if appropriate.
eliminar_modal.field_reason: Why do you want to delete this record?
eliminar_modal.ph_reason: Explain the reason for the removal request.
eliminar_modal.error_no_reason: Please explain the reason for the request.

info_modal.title: Help & Emergencies
info_modal.phones_note: Tap a number to call. Available offline.

first_hours.title: Check your safety and that of your loved ones
first_hours.detail: Check for injuries. Stay away from damaged structures, cables and gas leaks.

first_hours.title: Shut off utilities if there is a risk
first_hours.detail: If you smell gas or see sparks, close the gas valve and turn off the electricity.

first_hours.title: Let others know you are safe
first_hours.detail: Send a short message to your family. Use SMS if calls won't go through.

first_hours.title: Meet at a safe spot
first_hours.detail: Pick an open area, away from buildings, as a family meeting point.

first_hours.title: Keep an emergency backpack ready
first_hours.detail: Water, flashlight, documents, medicines, charger and some cash.

first_hours.title: Report what you see
first_hours.detail: Log collection centers, hospitals, people or outages in this app to help others.

first_hours.title: Do not spread rumors
first_hours.detail: Share only verified information. Avoid overloading emergency lines.

first_hours.title: Look after those in need
first_hours.detail: Support elderly people, people with disabilities or those who are alone near you.

first_hours.title: Stay informed
first_hours.detail: Follow official sources and save battery for real emergencies.
